title: AAA Capability Card
description: Standardized metadata for a tool in the unified capability fabric. Every tool — MCP or otherwise — is described by one capability card so all agents share the same semantic understanding.

id.description: Canonical tool identifier. snake_case or colon-namespaced.

description.description: What the tool does, when to use it, and what it returns.

server.description: Which MCP server or organ hosts this tool.

source_type.description: How the tool is provided to the federation.

tags.description: Semantic tags for vector search and filtering.

epistemic_tag.description: Evidence quality of the tool's outputs.

risk_tier.description: Maximum damage this tool can cause if misused.

approval_policy.description: Default approval gate for this tool.

parameters.description: JSON Schema-like parameter summary (optional, for deep introspection).

toolcard.description: Short usage example or affordance hint shown to agents.
